overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character transitioning from a covered transit waiting area to walking along a neon-lit downtown street at night, ending with a dramatic upward view of towering skyscrapers and overhead infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit waiting area with orange benches

events.description: character stands up from the orange bench

agents.ego_description: sitting on the orange transit bench looking at a handheld device, then standing up

entered.detail: bright orange public seating with perforated backrest
rectangular concrete structure with plants on top
green foliage growing from wall-mounted planters
dark metal and glass canopy providing cover
linear LED light strip illuminating the wall
crumpled paper litter on the yellow-tiled ground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a sheltered transit waiting area with orange benches and concrete planters. The character sits on a bench interacting with a device, then stands up. Warm artificial lighting illuminates the concrete walls and potted plants while the city street is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from covered shelter to open city street

events.description: exits the covered waiting area onto the open city sidewalk
futuristic black sedan drives past on the wet street

agents.ego_description: walking out from the covered shelter onto the sidewalk and proceeding along the street

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the wet asphalt street

entered.detail: wet asphalt road with reflective surface and lane markings
sleek black vehicle parked at the curb
tall pole with bright overhead lamp illuminating the street
large illuminated digital sign on building facade
tall modern building with reflective glass windows

segments.scene_description: The character exits the sheltered area onto a wet city street at night. A futuristic sedan drives past on the left while neon signs glow in the distance. The transition reveals the urban environment with glass buildings and street lamps reflecting off the damp pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown cyberpunk street with towering billboards

events.description: pedestrian crosses the street ahead at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange-tiled sidewalk through the neon-lit downtown canyon

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: distinctive orange diamond-plate textured pedestrian walkway
large vertical advertisement sign with 'PURE OVERKILL' text
massive high-rise building with illuminated windows and neon accents
ornate black pole with bright white light fixture
scattered litter and discarded items along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the distinctive orange-tiled sidewalk through a canyon of towering skyscrapers. Massive neon billboards including one for 'PURE OVERKILL' illuminate the scene with purple and orange light. The wet streets reflect the neon glow as sparse pedestrians and vehicles move through the downtown area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon looking up at skyscrapers and overhead infrastructure

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tops of the towering buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk while looking up at the towering architecture and overhead bridges

entered.detail: upper floors of massive building with grid-patterned windows
elevated walkway or transit line connecting buildings above
dark night sky visible between the towering structures
illuminated signage mounted on the upper building levels

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the dizzying height of the surrounding skyscrapers, showing their glass facades extending into the night sky. An overhead bridge structure spans between buildings while neon lights trace the architectural lines. The perspective emphasizes the vertical scale of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered transit hub into the overwhelming verticality of a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins within a warm, artificially lit waiting area where a character stands from an orange bench, moving past concrete planters toward the city street. As the character exits the shelter, the environment opens up into a damp urban landscape where a futuristic sedan glides past and neon signs reflect off the wet pavement. The scene then expands as the character walks along an orange-tiled sidewalk through a canyon of skyscrapers, passing massive purple and orange billboards like Pure Overkill. Finally, the camera tilts sharply upward, shifting the perspective from the street level to the dizzying heights of glass facades and overhead bridges that span the night sky.
